question: Which city is the administrative and cultural capital of Tunisia, featuring the famous Avenue Habib Bourguiba?
Identify this major coastal city known as the 'Pearl of the Sahel,' famous for its Ribat and Medina.
Which city features this iconic Ribat and was the birthplace of Tunisia's first president?
Identify this northernmost city in Africa, famous for its historic Old Port and canal.
Which city is known as the fourth holiest city in Islam and is famous for its Great Mosque?
Identify Tunisia's second-largest city, known for its massive industrial port and well-preserved Medina walls.
Which coastal city, once the first Fatimid capital, is famous for its 'Skifa Kahla' gate?
Identify this famous oasis city, renowned for its distinct yellow-brick architecture and massive palm groves.
Which southern city is the gateway to the Ksour region and inspired the name of a planet in Star Wars?
Identify this city located at the foot of its namesake mountain, famous for its Roman aqueduct starting point.
Which high-altitude city in the northwest is known for its Ottoman-era Kasbah and Sidi Bou Makhlouf shrine?
Identify this unique city, one of the few places in the world where an oasis meets the sea.
Which northwestern city serves as a major agricultural hub near the ancient site of Bulla Regia?
Identify this southwestern city, one of the oldest oases in Tunisia and a major producer of Deglet Noor dates.
Which central-north city is a gateway to the ancient ruins of Mactaris and the Bargou mountain range?
